onDropdownOpen: {{Promise.all([get_pending_students_lookup.run(), get_pending_initial_evaluations.run()]).then(() => storeValue('evaluaciones_student_options', (get_pending_initial_evaluations.data && get_pending_initial_evaluations.data.length ? get_pending_initial_evaluations.data : get_pending_students_lookup.data) || [])).catch((error) => showAlert('Error cargando alumnos pendientes: '+ error.message, 'error'));}}
sourceData: {{(() => { const rows = (get_pending_students_lookup.data && get_pending_students_lookup.data.length ? get_pending_students_lookup.data : (appsmith.store.evaluaciones_student_options || get_pending_initial_evaluations.data || [])); if (!rows.length && appsmith.store.evaluaciones_loading) return [{ label: 'Cargando alumnos...', value: '__loading__' }]; return rows.length ? rows.map((a) => ({ label: a.label || ((a.nombre_completo || 'Sin nombre') + ' (' + (a.rut || 'Sin RUT') + ')'), value: a.value || a.id_alumno })) : [{ label: 'Sin alumnos cargados', value: '__empty__' }]; })()}}
